salvage.note.title: Note
salvage.note.common: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Common Unidentified Gear opened and then salvaged with Copper-Fed Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.
salvage.note.masterwork: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Unidentified Gear (Masterwork) opened and then salvaged with Runecrafter's Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.
salvage.note.rare: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Rare Unidentified Gear opened and then salvaged with Silver-Fed Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.

fourWinds.overview.p1: The Four Winds Festival is an annual event that celebrates the cultural diversity of Tyria. With activities like Queen's Gauntlet and Boss Blitz, it offers unique opportunities to obtain valuable rewards and exclusive materials.
fourWinds.cards.gauntlet.title: Queen's Gauntlet
fourWinds.cards.gauntlet.desc: A series of combat challenges that reward unique tokens and valuable materials.
fourWinds.cards.blitz.title: Boss Blitz
fourWinds.cards.blitz.desc: Cooperative event where teams compete to defeat bosses quickly.
fourWinds.cards.tokens.title: Festival Tokens
fourWinds.cards.tokens.desc: Main festival currency. Exchange for unique Tome of Knowledge
fourWinds.calculator.title: Box Calculator
fourWinds.prices.title: Prices and Data

fourWinds.strategies.gauntlet.title: Queen's Gauntlet
fourWinds.strategies.gauntlet.progressiv: Start with the easiest challenges and progress gradually.
fourWinds.strategies.gauntlet.buildsDesc: Use specific builds for each type of challenge.
fourWinds.strategies.gauntlet.rewardsDes: Harder challenges offer exclusive tokens and materials.
fourWinds.strategies.blitz.title: Boss Blitz
fourWinds.strategies.blitz.coordinationD: Form coordinated groups to maximize defeat speed.
fourWinds.strategies.blitz.routesDesc: Plan routes that minimize travel time between bosses.
fourWinds.strategies.blitz.timingDesc: The best times are during server peak hours.

fourWinds.tips.gauntlet: Prioritize Queen's Gauntlet for unique rewards
fourWinds.tips.groups: Form groups for faster Boss Blitz
fourWinds.tips.tokens: Accumulate Festival Tokens for bulk exchanges
fourWinds.tips.events: Participate in special events during the festival

halloween.overview.p1: The Halloween Festival in Guild Wars 2 is one of the best farming opportunities. With activities like the Mad King's Labyrinth and Trick-or-Treat Bags, you can generate significant amounts of gold in a short time.
halloween.cards.bags.title: Trick-or-Treat Bags
halloween.cards.bags.desc: The bags contain random items with different drop rates. Price analysis helps you determine if it's profitable to open them.
halloween.cards.lab.title: Mad King's Labyrinth
halloween.cards.lab.desc: The labyrinth is the main activity. With a good route and group, you can obtain hundreds of bags per hour.
halloween.cards.corn.title: Candy Corn
halloween.cards.corn.desc: The main festival material. Its prices fluctuate during and after the event, creating trading opportunities.
halloween.calculator.title: Custom Halloween Calculator
halloween.calculator.emptyTip: Use the buttons above to add items
halloween.strategies.title: Farming Strategies
halloween.strategies.lab.title: Mad King's Labyrinth
halloween.strategies.lab.routeDesc: Follow a specific route to maximize bags per hour.
halloween.strategies.lab.groupDesc: A group of 5 people can obtain 200+ bags per hour.
halloween.strategies.lab.timingDesc: The best times are during server peak hours.
halloween.strategies.tp.title: Trading Post
halloween.strategies.tp.earlyDesc: Buy bags before the festival when prices are low.
halloween.strategies.tp.sellDesc: Sell specific items when their prices reach peaks.
halloween.strategies.tp.cornDesc: Take advantage of Candy Corn price fluctuations.
fourWinds.zephyrite.description: The Zephyrite Supply Box are the main boxes of this festival. All calculators and "Box Opening" data are based on the analysis of these specific boxes.
fourWinds.zephyrite.wikiLink: See more information on the Wiki

festivals.description: Specific calculators and guides to maximize your profits during annual festivals
festivals.info.title: What are Festivals?
festivals.info.description: Festivals in Guild Wars 2 are seasonal celebrations that occur throughout the year. Each festival has its own theme, unique activities, and special rewards. These events typically last about 3 weeks and offer unique opportunities for farming and obtaining exclusive items.
festivals.info.activities.title: Unique Activities
festivals.info.activities.description: Each festival includes specific activities such as puzzles, races, combat events, and special events.
festivals.info.exclusiveItems.title: Exclusive Items
festivals.info.exclusiveItems.descriptio: Skins, weapons, and other items that are only available during the festival.
festivals.info.tempRewards.title: Temporary Rewards
festivals.info.tempRewards.description: Materials, currencies, and other resources that can be sold for gold on the Trading Post.
festivals.farming.title: Festival Farming Strategies
festivals.farming.during.title: During the Festival
festivals.farming.during.participate.des: Complete daily activities to obtain consistent rewards.
festivals.farming.during.intensive.title: Intensive Farming
festivals.farming.during.intensive.descr: Dedicate time to the most profitable activities of the festival.
festivals.farming.after.title: After the Festival
festivals.farming.after.selling.title: Strategic Selling
festivals.farming.after.selling.descript: Wait for prices to rise after the festival.
festivals.farming.after.analysis.title: Market Analysis
festivals.farming.after.analysis.descrip: Monitor prices to identify the best selling moment.
festivals.goldEarning.title: How to Earn Gold in Festivals?
festivals.goldEarning.description: Festivals are one of the best opportunities to generate gold in Guild Wars 2. Each festival has specific farming methods that can generate between 20-30g per hour depending on your efficiency and the festival in question.
festivals.goldEarning.main.title: Main Methods
festivals.goldEarning.main.activity.desc: Repeatedly participate in the most profitable activities of the festival.
festivals.goldEarning.main.containers.de: Open bags, envelopes, and other containers to obtain valuable items.
festivals.goldEarning.main.materials.des: Sell festival-specific materials on the Trading Post.
festivals.goldEarning.advanced.title: Advanced Strategies
festivals.goldEarning.advanced.storage.d: Save items to sell them in the next festival.
festivals.goldEarning.advanced.multiChar: Use several characters to maximize daily rewards.
festivals.goldEarning.proTip.title: 💡 Pro Tip
festivals.goldEarning.proTip.description: The most profitable festivals are usually Halloween (Trick-or-Treat Bags) and Wintersday (Wintersday Gifts). These can generate 30-40g per hour with efficient farming. Use our specific calculators to determine the exact profitability of each activity.
festivals.tips.title: General Tips
festivals.tips.planning.title: Planning
festivals.tips.planning.description: Research festivals in advance and prepare your characters.
festivals.tips.diversification.title: Diversification
festivals.tips.diversification.descripti: Don't focus on just one activity, explore all options.
festivals.tips.community.title: Community
festivals.tips.community.description: Join organized groups to maximize efficiency.
festivals.tips.enjoy.title: Enjoy
festivals.tips.enjoy.description: Remember that festivals are designed to be fun.
festivals.descriptions.lunar: The celebration of the new year in the Canthan calendar
festivals.descriptions.dragonBash: Summer festival celebrating resistance against the Elder Dragons
festivals.descriptions.fourWinds: Summer festival with mount races and adventures
festivals.descriptions.halloween: The terrifying festival of Mad King Thorn
festivals.descriptions.wintersday: Winter festival celebrating the new year in the Mouvelian calendar
salvagePage.title: Salvaging
salvagePage.subtitle: Complete guide to salvaging in Guild Wars 2. Learn techniques, calculate profitability, and maximize your profits.
salvagePage.whatIsSalvagingDesc: Salvaging is the process of salvaging equipment to obtain materials. It is one of the most profitable ways to earn gold in Guild Wars 2, especially with certain types of items.
salvagePage.considerValue: Consider the value of the full item
salvagePage.useAppropriateKit: Use the appropriate kit for each type
craftingPage.title: Crafting Guide
craftingPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about crafting in Guild Wars 2. From professions to profit strategies.
craftingPage.whatIsCraftingDesc: Crafting in Guild Wars 2 is a way to create objects, weapons, armor, and consumables. It's an excellent way to earn gold and obtain items for your character.
craftingPage.learnMoreGlossary: Learn more crafting concepts in the Glossary
craftingPage.conversionsDesc: Calculate the profitability of converting Tier 5 to Tier 6 materials through the Mystic Forge. Prices are updated in real-time from the Guild Wars 2 API.
craftingPage.benefits.sellItems: Sell items on the Trading Post
craftingPage.tips.startProfession: Start with a profession you like
craftingPage.tips.efficientLevelingDesc: Craft items you can sell to recover costs while leveling up
craftingPage.tips.cheapMaterialsDesc: Buy materials during low demand periods to save gold
craftingPage.tips.profitableRecipesDesc: Focus on recipes that have good demand on the Trading Post
craftingPage.tips.conversionsDesc: Convert lower tier materials to higher tier when profitable
craftingPage.advanced.marketAnalysisDesc: Monitor Trading Post prices to identify profitable crafting opportunities.
craftingPage.advanced.purchaseTimingDesc: Buy materials when prices are low, especially after events.
craftingPage.advanced.profitableConversi: Convert lower tier materials to higher tier when the price difference is favorable.
craftingPage.advanced.specializationDesc: Focus on one or two professions to maximize your efficiency and profits.
salvageCommon.title: Unidentified Gear - Common
salvageCommon.description: Calculate how much gold you earn by opening and salvaging Piece of Common Unidentified Gear
salvageCommon.note: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Common Unidentified Gear (Common) opened and then salvaged with Copper-Fed Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.

researchNotesPage.title: Research Notes
researchNotesPage.subtitle: Calculate the cost and efficiency of obtaining Research Notes through salvaging. Maximize your profits by understanding the true cost per note.
researchNotesPage.tip1: Use appropriate salvage kits for each rarity
researchNotesPage.tip2: Check current market prices before salvaging
researchNotesPage.tip3: Consider the value of materials you might get
researchNotesPage.tip4: Research Notes are used in crafting ascended gear
researchNotesPage.tip5: Prices can fluctuate based on crafting demand
researchNotesPage.tip6: Bulk salvaging can reduce overall costs
researchNotesPage.tip7: Research Notes are a currency and crafting material earned by salvaging crafted items with a Research Kit, or by toggling the option to automatically research crafted items in the crafting interface. They are automatically stored in the wallet upon acquisition.
orrianJewelryBoxPage.title: Orrian Jewelry Box
orrianJewelryBoxPage.subtitle: Analyze the value and profitability of this mysterious box from Orr.
orrianJewelryBoxPage.sellAndVendor: Sell on Market and Sell to Vendor
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip1: Boxes can contain jewelry of different rarities
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip2: Consider expected value vs. purchase price
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip4: Check prices before buying or selling
orrianJewelryBoxPage.noMarketDataDesc: This box cannot be traded on the market. This means you can only open it to get its contents or sell it to an NPC vendor.
orrianJewelryBoxPage.vendorTip: The vendor value is only 256 copper. It's better to open the box to get jewelry that may be worth more.
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip7: This box cannot be traded, only opened
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip8: The vendor value is very low, better to open
orrianJewelryBoxPage.dropWarning: Could not load drops. Showing preconfigured quantities.
glossary.title: GW2 Glossary
glossary.subtitle: Complete guide of important concepts and terms for earning gold in Guild Wars 2
glossary.items.salvaging.title: Salvaging
glossary.items.salvaging.description: Process of breaking down equipment and objects to obtain basic materials. Materials can be sold on the Trading Post or used for crafting. Salvaging is fundamental to the game's economy.
glossary.items.salvaging.tips.tip1: Salvage kits have different success rates
glossary.items.salvaging.tips.tip2: Some rare items can yield valuable materials
glossary.items.salvaging.tips.tip3: Salvaging can generate Luck for the player
glossary.items.salvageKits.title: Salvage Kits
glossary.items.salvageKits.description: Tools that allow breaking down objects into materials. Each kit has a specific success rate and cost per use. Higher quality kits have greater probability of obtaining rare materials.
glossary.items.luckCalculator.title: Luck Calculator
glossary.items.luckCalculator.descriptio: Tool to calculate the efficiency of cost per Luck point obtained when salvaging objects. Luck is a progression system that permanently increases character statistics.
glossary.items.researchNotes.title: Research Notes
glossary.items.researchNotes.description: Special currency obtained by salvaging crafted objects with a Research Kit. Used to unlock ascended crafting recipes and are automatically stored in the wallet.
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.title: Farming Routes
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.description: Optimized sequences of activities to maximize gold per hour. Include specific waypoints, event rotations, and strategies for different content types.
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.tips.tip1: Routes adapt to different experience levels
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.tips.tip2: Some routes require access to specific expansions
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.tips.tip3: Routes can be individual or group-based
glossary.items.festivals.title: Festivals
glossary.items.festivals.description: Seasonal events that occur on specific dates of the real year. Offer unique content, exclusive rewards, and special activities not available at other times.
glossary.items.festivals.tips.tip1: Festivals follow the real world calendar
glossary.items.festivals.tips.tip2: Each festival has unique mechanics and rewards
glossary.noResults.title: No results found
glossary.noResults.description: Try adjusting your search terms or category filter
